2206650.name: Visual Novel Maker - IDEAL
2206650.description:
Dive into a cyberspace world with the thrilling tracks of IDEAL! ayato sound create’s latest music pack brings you 24 tracks to bring your modern game into the 21st century. Featuring slick instrumentals and energetic electronic beats, this pack is sure to put your players right into the action!

Each track comes in multiple file formats, making it simple to add into your favorite engine. Fill your modern and sci-fi worlds with toe-tapping techno from IDEAL!

Features:

* 24 royalty free songs
* ogg, wav, mp3, m4a and looping ogg file formats included

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
2206650.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
